docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79559895)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $876.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 79675151) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT 301 BATTERY LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DOING BUSINESS AS 301 BATTERY MM LCC, ALSO KNOWN AS 301 BATTERY MM LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
